params.name: Seated Scribe
params.source:
* Kemetic Treasure Map (20%), Lottery Machine (0.03%), Wishing (0.82%)
* [[Indigent Nobleman]] (72k {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}})
params.description:
On May 28, 1850, this seated statue of scribe was unearthed in the Saqqara Necropolis.

This 4000-year scribe statue was unearthed from the necropolis and the statue represents a special and noble profession in ancient Egypt. The elegant statue was carved with smooth lines and features a vivid expression of the scribe. The scroll in hit left hand and the pen in his right hand reflected his professionalism.
